steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: Both texts repeatedly focus on the word “curry” — its colonial origins, accuracy, and appropriateness. Text 1 argues it should be abandoned; Text 2 defends its continued use.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content: Choice D identifies the core topic: both texts debate whether the term “curry” should be used. Text 1 argues for abandoning it due to its colonial roots and inaccuracy; Text 2 defends continuing to use it. The other options—specific cuisines, methodology, or broad history—are either minimally discussed or irrelevant to the core debate. That matches choice D — D is correct.
